questions.question: Which Eurorack module series includes designs that incorporate literal radioactive material, worms cultured in petri dishes, or dirt as part of the circuit behavior?
options: ERD (Electro-Retina Display / Extreme Response Device) series

questions.question: Which Eurorack module includes circuitry designed to potentially damage or destroy other modules in your system as a core feature?
What does Recovery Effects' Sound Destruction Device do?
options: Its CV inputs can accept bipolar ±10V signals that exceed internal op-amp rails, risking blowback into the sending module
The variable resistor network can create near-short conditions on the input path when fully destroyed, potentially overloading envelope followers or comparators
Twin-T filter resonance peaks can generate massive voltage spikes (>20Vpp) when overdriven, frying downstream VCAs or filters
None of the above — it's audio-path only and safe; the destruction is purely sonic, not electrical
